title: Launch checklist — Legal Enquiry Review
note: Engineering hardening is complete. Items below still need business assets, legal approval or live infrastructure before the Phase 6 exit condition is fully met.

engineering_complete.detail: Skip link, focusable main, focus styles, overflow-wrap, disclosure focus
Video fallback, analytics swallow, form validation, duplicate-submit guard, n8n timeout/generic errors
CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, nosniff, frame denial, COOP; secrets check in prebuild
Title, description, canonical /, OG/Twitter, favicon, redirects from alternate routes
npm run check:copy writes ops/launch-readiness.json; no prohibited claim patterns in copy
lead_id-only lead identifier; sanitised event props

business_blockers.detail: Replace draft transcript and proofread VTT against final recording
Substantiate, revise or remove Staffordshire proof placeholder
Complete registered name, company number and address in site-config
Approve and insert lawful basis + retention in site-config
Production N8N_WEBHOOK_URL/SECRET, Enquiry Reviews sheet, SPF/DKIM/DMARC for achow@standoutgroup.net
